actionConfiguration.body:
UPDATE public."jobs" SET
		"required_machine_type_id" = {{update_form.fieldState.required_machine_type_id.isVisible ? update_form.formData.required_machine_type_id : update_form.sourceData.required_machine_type_id}},
		"duration" = '{{update_form.fieldState.duration.isVisible ? update_form.formData.duration : update_form.sourceData.duration}}',
    "domain_start" = '{{update_form.fieldState.domain_start.isVisible ? update_form.formData.domain_start : update_form.sourceData.domain_start}}',
		"domain_end" = '{{update_form.fieldState.domain_end.isVisible ? update_form.formData.domain_end : update_form.sourceData.domain_end}}',
		"predecessor" = '{{update_form.fieldState.predecessor.isVisible ? update_form.formData.predecessor : update_form.sourceData.predecessor}}',
		"due_date" = '{{update_form.fieldState.due_date.isVisible ? update_form.formData.due_date : update_form.sourceData.due_date}}',
		"qty_ordered" = '{{update_form.fieldState.qty_ordered.isVisible ? update_form.formData.qty_ordered : update_form.sourceData.qty_ordered}}',
		"qty_initialized" = '{{update_form.fieldState.qty_initialized.isVisible ? update_form.formData.qty_initialized : update_form.sourceData.qty_initialized}}',
		"locked" = '{{update_form.fieldState.locked.isVisible ? update_form.formData.locked : update_form.sourceData.locked}}',
		"locked_start" = '{{update_form.fieldState.locked_start.isVisible ? update_form.formData.locked_start : update_form.sourceData.locked_start}}',
		"locked_machine" = '{{update_form.fieldState.locked_machine.isVisible ? update_form.formData.locked_machine : update_form.sourceData.locked_machine}}'
	WHERE "job_id" = {{data_table.selectedRow.job_id}};

UPDATE public."jobs" SET
		"required_machine_type_id" = {{update_form.fieldState.required_machine_type_id.isVisible ? update_form.formData.required_machine_type_id : update_form.sourceData.required_machine_type_id}},
		"duration" = '{{update_form.fieldState.duration.isVisible ? update_form.formData.duration : update_form.sourceData.duration}}',
    "domain_start" = '{{update_form.fieldState.domain_start.isVisible ? update_form.formData.domain_start : update_form.sourceData.domain_start}}',
		"domain_end" = '{{update_form.fieldState.domain_end.isVisible ? update_form.formData.domain_end : update_form.sourceData.domain_end}}',
		"predecessor" = '{{update_form.fieldState.predecessor.isVisible ? update_form.formData.predecessor : update_form.sourceData.predecessor}}',
		"due_date" = '{{update_form.fieldState.due_date.isVisible ? update_form.formData.due_date : update_form.sourceData.due_date}}',
		"qty_ordered" = '{{update_form.fieldState.qty_ordered.isVisible ? update_form.formData.qty_ordered : update_form.sourceData.qty_ordered}}',
		"qty_initialized" = '{{update_form.fieldState.qty_initialized.isVisible ? update_form.formData.qty_initialized : update_form.sourceData.qty_initialized}}',
		"locked" = '{{update_form.fieldState.locked.isVisible ? update_form.formData.locked : update_form.sourceData.locked}}',
		"locked_start" = '{{update_form.fieldState.locked_start.isVisible ? update_form.formData.locked_start : update_form.sourceData.locked_start}}',
		"locked_machine" = '{{update_form.fieldState.locked_machine.isVisible ? update_form.formData.locked_machine : update_form.sourceData.locked_machine}}'
	WHERE "job_id" = {{data_table.selectedRow.job_id}};

UPDATE public."machines" SET
		"type" = '{{update_form.fieldState.type.isVisible ? update_form.formData.type : update_form.sourceData.type}}',
		"capacity" = '{{update_form.fieldState.capacity.isVisible ? update_form.formData.capacity : update_form.sourceData.capacity}}',
    "machine_type_id" = '{{update_form.fieldState.machine_type_id.isVisible ? update_form.formData.machine_type_id : update_form.sourceData.machine_type_id}}'
WHERE "machine_id" = {{data_table.selectedRow.machine_id}};

UPDATE public."machines" SET
		"type" = '{{update_form.fieldState.type.isVisible ? update_form.formData.type : update_form.sourceData.type}}',
		"capacity" = '{{update_form.fieldState.capacity.isVisible ? update_form.formData.capacity : update_form.sourceData.capacity}}',
    "machine_type_id" = '{{update_form.fieldState.machine_type_id.isVisible ? update_form.formData.machine_type_id : update_form.sourceData.machine_type_id}}'
WHERE "machine_id" = {{data_table.selectedRow.machine_id}};
